description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized, blocky human figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure appears to be wearing a long coat and a cap, with angular, geometric forms making up the body and limbs. The right arm is bent and raised, holding what looks like a book or tablet, while the left arm rests at the side. The facial features are abstracted but discernible, giving the figure a solemn, authoritative presence. The surface is dark, with a patinated, weathered texture typical of bronze or similar metals. The overall form is monolithic and robust, suggesting permanence and gravitas.
description: A geometric, blocky human figure in a long coat and cap stands on a rectangular plinth, holding a book or tablet. The sculpture has a dark, weathered metallic surface and an abstract, monumental style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, cap, and the raised right arm holding a book or tablet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular folds of the coat and the profile of the head and arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat and the overall blocky silhouette of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm holding the book or tablet and the layered, geometric construction of the coat.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure holding a book or tablet
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is shown isolated on a plain background.
